headline: MarketBeat Week in Review – 03/16 - 03/20
summary: This week, all the major indexes closed below their 200-day moving averages, meaning investors may have to wait a little longer for the stock selloff to end

headline: 3 Market Segments I'm Targeting When Iran War Ends
summary: IWM gives broad small-cap exposure hit by oil-price shocks. XLY stands to benefit when oil prices drop, as will JETS. Read here for more analysis.

headline: Forget Stagflation - This Is The Kind Of Market Where I Start Building Positions
summary: Bullish S&P 500 outlook: why cyclical value, asset managers (ARES, BN) and gold streamers (FNV, AEM) look attractive amid stagflation risks. See more here.
